disallowed_proof: fast-lane success treated as deployability proof
degraded actuator health used to waive route-level runtime evidence
rollback omitted because the artifact compiled locally
selected_lane_contract.goal: Prove the candidate artifact is deployable on the approved Flyway v2 path, not merely that tests happen to be green.
prove: The release-grade lane passes with release guards, migration checks, and the deployable-state contract attached.
The candidate artifact demonstrates boot, health/readiness evidence, auth, tenant isolation, one O2C path, and one P2P/accounting path.
Rollback owner, trigger, and rehearsal evidence remain explicit before promotion.
